TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Quzi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 294 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 158 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 136 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga Balung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ quzi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa βaluŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Quzi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 294 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 158 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 136 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quzi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quzi hya' ga Balung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ quzi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na quzi ħjaʔ ɣa βaluŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
